org.reflections.util

Interface QueryBuilder

  • All Superinterfaces:
    NameHelper
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Scanners

    public interface QueryBuilder
extends NameHelper
    builder for store query 
     QueryBuilder builder = element -> store -> Set<String>

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.reflections.util.NameHelper

        primitiveDescriptors, primitiveNames, primitiveTypes

      transitive values indexed for keys String collection, including keys

      • Methods inherited from interface org.reflections.util.NameHelper

    • Method Detail

      • index

        default String index()

      • get

        default QueryFunction<Store,String> get(String key)
        direct values indexed for key String

        safely returns an empty Set<String> if index/key not found

        this is the only function accessing the Store multimap

      • get

        default QueryFunction<Store,String> get(AnnotatedElement element)
        direct values indexed for AnnotatedElement

        same as of(Set)
